---
applyTo: "**/sitemap*.xml,**/content/content.config.ts"
---

# Sitemap Rules

## Auto-generation

Sitemaps are auto-generated by `@astrojs/sitemap`. Do not manually create or edit
`sitemap-index.xml` or `sitemap-0.xml` — they are build artifacts.

## Configuration

Sitemap behavior is controlled in `astro.config.mjs`:

```javascript
import sitemap from '@astrojs/sitemap';

export default defineConfig({
  site: 'https://yourdomain.com',
  integrations: [
    sitemap({
      filter: (page) => !page.includes('/search'),
    }),
  ],
});
```

## Filtering

Exclude pages that should not be indexed:
- Search results pages
- Tag/category listing pages (if using `noindex`)
- Utility pages (login, 404)

Use the `filter` option in the sitemap integration, not manual exclusions.

## `site` property is required

The `site` property in `astro.config.mjs` must be set to the production domain. Without it,
the sitemap plugin cannot generate absolute URLs and will fail.

## robots.txt reference

`robots.txt` must reference the sitemap with the full absolute URL:

```
Sitemap: https://yourdomain.com/sitemap-index.xml
```

## Video sitemap

For sites with significant video content, consider a separate video sitemap. This is NOT
auto-generated — it requires a custom build step or plugin. Include it in `robots.txt`:

```
Sitemap: https://yourdomain.com/video-sitemap.xml
```

## Content collections and sitemap

Content collection items (blog posts, services, etc.) are included in the sitemap automatically
when they have corresponding page routes via `getStaticPaths()`. Ensure every content item
that should be discoverable has a page route.
